title: Blakea induta
taxonomy: Blakea induta is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is classified within the genus Blakea, which comprises several species of plants native to Central and South America. The family Melastomataceae, to which Blakea induta belongs, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The classification of Blakea induta reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants and its position within the larger tree of life.
